title: Citrusy Velvety Indulgent Garlic Greek Stir-fry
description: A citrusy and velvety garlic Greek dish featuring an air-fried garlic bulb with low-fat-friendly accompaniments.

ingredients.name: Garlic bulb
ingredients.notes: preferably garlic cloves without the papery skin

instructions: Slice the garlic bulb into thin slices and place them in a large bowl. Add olive oil, lemon juice, and red pepper flakes (if using) over the garlic slices.
Mix well until evenly coated with the marinade. Let it marinate for about 10 minutes.
Transfer the sliced garlic to the air fryer basket. Cook for 7-8 minutes or until golden brown and crispy on all sides. Remove from air fryer, let cool slightly.
In a mixing bowl, combine the cooked garlic with Greek yogurt, fresh parsley, and dill weed. Mix well to create a smooth mixture.
Serve immediately as a topping over your favorite dishes such as grilled meats or vegetables.
